headline: Public Storage Deal To Create Self Storage Leader And Test Execution
summary: Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) has agreed to acquire National Storage Affiliates in a $10.5b all stock transaction. The combined company is expected to become the largest self storage operator in the U.S. by market capitalization. The deal brings together over 1,000 properties across 37 states and Puerto Rico under a single platform. Public Storage enters this deal with shares at $286.13 and a mixed return profile, including a 10.7% gain year to date and a 46.3% return over five years, alongside...
